content.text:
You are a helpful coding assistant. Be concise.

Workspace map:
- The project repo is mounted at the burrow workspace root.
- /workspace/.canopy/agent.json is the rendered agent definition (warren seeded it).
- /workspace/.mulch/expertise/<domain>.jsonl holds the project's expertise records.
- /workspace/.seeds/issues.jsonl holds the project's issue queue.

Operating contract:
- Edit files in place. Run tests when relevant.
- Quality gates are terminal, not advisory. You are NOT done until the gate exits zero. Resolve the command in this order: `$WARREN_QUALITY_GATE` if set, otherwise the command documented in CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md, otherwise fall back to `bun run check:all` or `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test`. Run it before committing and again before reporting completion. Do not declare the task complete, hand off, or end the session with a red gate — fix failures (including lint warnings, which CI treats as errors) until it is green. If the gate is genuinely unfixable in this run, say so explicitly and leave the work open rather than claiming success.
- Use git as you normally would. Commit your changes; warren reaps the branch and pushes upstream.
- Committing is mandatory, not the same as staging. `git add` ALONE IS NOT ENOUGH — you must run `git commit` so the work lands as a real commit. A run that ends with staged-but-uncommitted changes is treated as a FAILURE (`dropped_commit`), not a success. Before you report completion, run `git status`/`git log` and confirm your changes are in a commit, not just staged. The only exception is when you have genuinely made no file changes at all.
- Do not run `git push` yourself — warren handles the push host-side after the run terminates.

---

work on sd warren-cef0. use ml. commit when done.

Title:    Server sweep — remove the orphaned Formalize endpoint. Delete POST /plots/:id/formalize from ROUTE_TABLE (src/server/handlers/index.ts), the formalizePlotHandler + brainstorm-summarize logic in src/server/handlers/plots/workbench.ts, and src/server/handlers/plots.workbench.formalize.test.ts. Regenerate docs/http-api.md (bun run gen:docs) and docs/openapi.yaml (bun run gen:openapi). Verify no remaining server caller references formalize.
Type:     task   Priority: Medium
Labels:   workspace, server, cleanup

<!-- seeds:plan-backref:start -->
Step 1 of plan pl-0008.

Parent seed: warren-dde5 — Collapse Leveret + Plot into a single tabbed Workspace surface
Plan template: feature
Plan approach: Make the Plot the spine and the conversation a facet of it. Introduce one 'Workspace' top-level section: a single cross-project list (one row per Plot, with an active-conversation indicator) and one tabbed detail page (/workspace/:id) that…

Run `sd plan show pl-0008` for the full plan (context, alternatives, sibling steps, acceptance criteria).
<!-- seeds:plan-backref:end -->
Blocks:     warren-b265, warren-dde5

Updated:  2026-06-13T23:44:28.363Z


Plan: pl-0008  [approved]
Plan steps (14):
  warren-cef0  [open]  Server sweep — remove the orphaned Formalize endpoint. Delete POST /plots/:id/formalize from ROUTE_TABLE (src/server/handlers/index.ts), the formalizePlotHandler + brainstorm-summarize logic in src/server/handlers/plots/workbench.ts, and src/server/handlers/plots.workbench.formalize.test.ts. Regenerate docs/http-api.md (bun run gen:docs) and docs/openapi.yaml (bun run gen:openapi). Verify no remaining server caller references formalize.
  warren-d861  [open]  Server sweep — remove residual mode=interactive / brainstorm dispatch remnants left after warren-d622. Audit src/server/handlers/runs/ (parseRunMode + createRunHandler) and src/runs/spawn/dispatch.ts for any mode:'interactive' / interactiveAgent handling and the 'brainstorm' interactive built-in remnants; remove dead branches while PRESERVING the 'planner' interactive agent and mode:'conversation'. Remove the vestigial interactiveAgents.brainstormRuntime knob from src/warren-config/schema.ts only if it is unreferenced after the sweep. Update or trim affected tests.
  warren-b265  [open]  UI API-client sweep — remove the dead client methods and types: plotsApi.startBrainstorm (+ StartBrainstormInput/Response), runsApi.createInteractive, and plotsApi.formalize (+ formalize request/response types) from src/ui/src/api/client.ts and src/ui/src/api/types.ts. Fix every TypeScript reference so bun run typecheck and the src/ui tsc both pass.
  warren-af60  [open]  Delete the dead UI panels. Remove src/ui/src/pages/plot-detail/interactive-panel.tsx and its usage in PlotDetail.tsx (InteractivePanel — Start brainstorming / Run planner / Formalize, all built on retired mode=interactive). Remove StartBrainstormDialog + the 'Start brainstorming' button from src/ui/src/pages/Plots.tsx. KEEP all still-live plot-detail/ sub-components (intent-panel, substrate-panel, activity-feed, header-controls, run-plan, batch-dispatch). Update affected component tests.
  warren-dc54  [open]  Build the Workspace list page. Add src/ui/src/pages/Workspace.tsx at a new /workspace route: a single cross-project list with one row per Plot (the durable spine), merging today's Plots list and Leveret conversations list. Columns: name, project, status/phase, intent preview, active-conversation indicator, needs-you reasons, last activity. Reuse the Plots server ?status/?filter chip contract. Actions: New Plot (existing dialog) and Start conversation (existing NewConversationButton). Backed by plotsApi.list joined with conversationsApi.list.
  warren-6e7d  [open]  Build the Workspace detail shell. Add src/ui/src/pages/WorkspaceDetail.tsx at /workspace/:id (keyed by plotId): a persistent header (PlotNameEditor, StatusTransitionControl, PlotSyncButton, project link, summary link) plus tab navigation Shape / Plan / Run / Activity with tab state in a ?tab= query param. Wire empty tab-panel child components to be filled by steps 7-10. Load the plot via plotsApi.get and reuse the existing 404/refresh-projects CTA.
  warren-3de4  [open]  Implement the Shape tab. Port the live Leveret conversation surface into Shape: the streamed Chat (sendMessage override -> POST /conversations/:id/messages) on the left and the dynamic intent editor (fieldsFromIntent / patchFromFields) on the right, plus RewakeButton and the SendOff action — reusing the conversation-detail/ sub-components. Resolve the Plot's active conversation via conversationsApi.list({plot}); when none is active, render a Start-conversation affordance. After send-off the tab goes read-only/quiet.
  warren-e33f  [open]  Implement the Plan tab (minimal). Once the merge-poller stamps conversation.plannerRunId, show the planner run status and a link out to the generated sd plan, then an operator Sign-off gate that enables the existing DispatchPlanButton (conversation-detail/dispatch-plan-dialog.tsx). No new inline plan renderer — link to the plan and dispatch over the existing /plan-runs path.
  warren-d17f  [open]  Implement the Run tab. Embed plan-run execution for the dispatched plan: children list + per-child PR-merge status + terminal state, reusing the PlanRunDetail content, and surface the Plot's auto-done transition when the final child merges (SPEC §11.P.Plot). Resolve the plan-run from the dispatched plot/plan.
  warren-ef97  [open]  Implement the Activity tab. Move the Plot event-log ActivityFeed (plot-detail/activity-feed.tsx) and the SubstratePanel (attachments) into the Activity tab, plus a link to the read-only Plot summary. Past/closed conversations for the Plot surface here as history entries so the full lifecycle is visible from one place.
  warren-9cad  [open]  Collapse nav + routing. Replace the 'Leveret' and 'Plots' sidebar entries in src/ui/src/components/Layout.tsx with a single 'Workspace' entry and move the needs-you badge onto it. Register /workspace + /workspace/:id; add redirects /plots -> /workspace, /plots/:id -> /workspace/:id, /leveret -> /workspace, and /leveret/:id -> resolve conversation.plotId then redirect to /workspace/:plotId?tab=shape. Delete the now-unused page shells Leveret.tsx, Plots.tsx, ConversationDetail.tsx, PlotDetail.tsx (keeping their reused sub-component trees). Update the router.
  warren-1198  [open]  Update acceptance + UI tests for the Workspace flow. Adapt scenario 33 (scripts/acceptance/scenarios/33-leveret-conversation-loop.ts) and any UI tests referencing the old /leveret + /plots routes/pages to the new Workspace surface; keep the scenario deterministic, idempotent, and self-cleaning. Assert the full walk: list -> Shape (conversation + intent) -> send-off -> Plan (planner + dispatch) -> Run.
  warren-3f94  [open]  Docs, gates, and bundle re-baseline. Update README + SPEC §11.O/§11.P UI references + LEVERET.md to describe the single Workspace surface and the removed brainstorm/formalize path; regen docs/http-api.md + docs/openapi.yaml; re-baseline bundle budgets (bun run check:bundle-size --update); get bun run check:all green. File a follow-up seed for the R-20 colony/multi-repo tier layered on top of Workspace.
  warren-8363  [open]  Release — minor version bump via .claude/commands/release.md flow (adopted)

# Project Expertise Manifest (via Mulch)

> Manifest mode lists available domains. Load records on demand with `ml prime <domain>` or `ml prime --files <path>`.

## Quick Reference

- `ml prime <domain>` — load full records for one domain
- `ml prime --files <path>` — load records relevant to specific files
- `ml search "<query>"` — search records across domains
- `ml record <domain> --type <type> --description "..."` — store an insight
- `ml learn` — discover what to record from changed files
- `ml sync` — validate, stage, and commit .mulch/ changes

## Available Domains

- **build**: 106 records (5 patterns, 72 conventions, 17 failures, 7 decisions, 5 references) — updated just now — approaching limit

---
# Seeds Workflow Context

> **Context Recovery**: Run `sd prime` after compaction, clear, or new session

# Session Close Protocol

**CRITICAL**: Before saying "done" or "complete", you MUST run this checklist:

```
[ ] 1. Close completed issues:    sd close <id1> <id2> ...
[ ] 2. File issues for remaining:  sd create --title "..."
[ ] 3. Run quality gates:          bun test && bun run lint && bun run typecheck
[ ] 4. Sync and push:              sd sync && git push
[ ] 5. Verify:                     git status (must show "up to date with origin")
```

**NEVER skip this.** Work is not done until pushed.

## Core Rules
- **Default**: Use seeds for ALL task tracking (`sd create`, `sd ready`, `sd close`)

content.text:
===
## build (2 records, updated just now)

### Conventions
- [mx-93f0e4] warren-9a61 (pl-df2f follow-up to warren-1e19): split residual >700-line in-scope files below the 500-line ratchet. Pattern: extract shared test harness/helpers into a non-.test sibling (kebab/dotted name, no bun:test import) and split the suite by describe-block into per-domain .test files. Done here: src/server/handlers/plots.workbench.test.ts -> plots.workbench.{answer,formalize}.test.ts + plots.workbench.harness.ts; src/projects/refresh.test.ts -> refresh.test.ts + refresh.plot-preserve.test.ts + refresh.test-helpers.ts; scripts/acceptance/scenarios/32-plot-workbench-loop.ts -> + 32-plot-workbench-loop.helpers.ts. Removed the three stale grandfather entries from scripts/file-size-budgets.json (ratchet only goes down). The three UI files (api/types.ts, RunDetail.tsx, api/client.ts) are OUT of scope: check-file-sizes.ts excludes src/ui/ via EXCLUDE_PATH_PREFIXES, so they're implicitly grandfathered and need no budget entry.

### Patterns
- [mx-bb2570] **warren-0.5.0-pl-0344-minor-bump**: warren 0.5.0 minor release (warren-3395, pl-0344 step 17 / parent warren-769e, SPEC §11.O) ships the Plot-workbench loop end-to-end: db schema for interactive runs + paused state (warren-67b6), agent.pauseTimeoutMs config (warren-cd37), interactive run primitive (warren-1117), interactive HTTP API (warren-b3b9), blocking-question pause detector for batch runs (warren-2976), brainstorm + planner built-in agents (warren-3de8 / warren-543d), brainstorm dispatcher + formalize (warren-d22e), needs-attention API (warren-d693), UI Chat primitive (warren-ea98), PlotDetail interactive surfaces (warren-444c), paused-run surfacing (warren-4ea4), Plot-first home + sidebar badge (warren-f0e2), V1.5 click-to-merge + auto-sync (warren-8e39), V1.5 summary artifact view (warren-8917), and acceptance scenario 32 (warren-7cd9). Minor bump is correct per /release default override: 17-step plan delivering a primary UI shift (Plots as the home surface) + a new run mode + the paused run state + two new built-in agents is feature-set scale, not patch. Two-place pin (mx-70e9e9): package.json + src/index.ts both moved 0.4.8→0.5.0 in lockstep; release.yml grep verifies. CHANGELOG.md [0.5.0] dated 2026-05-23 enumerates every step with seed id and pl-0344 step number for traceability. Quality gates green: lint + typecheck clean, bun test 1925 pass / 1 fail (the documented BurrowClientPool real-burrow flake unrelated, per mx-9e62e2 precedent). (CHANGELOG.md, package.json, src/index.ts) [relates to: mx-9e62e2]

## db (1 records, updated just now)

### Conventions
- [mx-24924e] RunsRepo.listByPlotId(plotId) (src/db/repos/runs.ts, warren-d22e / pl-0344 step 8) lists every run row bound to a Plot ordered by id asc (ids are random so this is a stable test order, not a time order). Covered by the runs_plot_id index in sqlite + postgres schemas. Caller responsibility: re-sort the underlying events by ts when chronological matters \u2014 the formalize parser does this via extractSuggestedIntent's internal sort. Used by POST /plots/:id/formalize to fan agent_message events across an entire brainstorm conversation in a single query.

## registry (1 records, updated just now)

### Conventions
- [mx-b00b16] BRAINSTORM_BUILTIN's Formalize-parser contract (src/registry/builtins/brainstorm.ts, warren-d22e / pl-0344 step 8): the system prompt advertises a field-marker format the formalize parser (src/plots/formalize.ts MARKER_RE) anchors. Shape is **goal**: <one-line>, **non_goals**: / -<item>, **constraints**: / -<item>, **success_criteria**: / -<item>. Case-insensitive; bold/heading/dash separators tolerated. The singular goal field is overwritten by the most recent claim, list fields accumulate deduplicated. Editing the prompt's marker examples without updating the regex (or vice versa) will break the brainstorm \u2192 formalize roundtrip silently \u2014 the builtins fixture test (src/registry/builtins/builtins.test.ts) pins the prompt strings; src/plots/formalize.test.ts pins the regex behaviour.

## runs (1 records, updated just now)

### Patterns
- [mx-b50fb5] **scenario-32-plot-workbench-loop**: Acceptance harness scenario 32 (scripts/acceptance/scenarios/32-plot-workbench-loop.ts, warren-7cd9 / pl-0344 step 16) exercises the full V1+V1.5 Plot-workbench loop end-to-end against a live warren+burrow: POST /brainstorm spawns the first interactive turn, POST /runs/:id/messages chains a follow-up, POST /plots/:id/formalize returns the legitimate source_message_count:0 envelope, intent edit + status drafting->ready->active promotes, then a batch run pauses on a host-injected question_posed (the burrow-cli body.env forwarding gap from warren-a346 is sidestepped by appending via the host-side 'plot' CLI on project.localPath; the pause detector polls events.jsonl directly), POST /plots/:id/questions/:event_id/answer drives the resume tick, batch reaches succeeded, gh_pr attach + POST /plots/:id/attachments/:ref/merge (WARREN_GH_FETCH_OVERRIDE=merged shim) returns merge.kind='merged' + refresh_scheduled=true, active->done, GET /plots/:id/summary renders the curated artifact (linked_prs/linked_commits/linked_seeds/decisions/timeline arrays; field is linked_prs NOT pull_requests). Per-scenario in-proc stack with WARREN_PAUSE_DETECTOR_ENABLED=1 + WARREN_PAUSE_DETECTOR_TICK_MS=500. Stub batch agent sleeps 18s via [sleep_ms=...]; answer happens mid-sleep so reap lands running->succeeded (paused->succeeded is illegal per ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS). (scripts/acceptance/run.ts)

## server (1 records, updated just now)

### Conventions
- [mx-2e34f7] GET /plots/needs-attention/count (src/server/handlers.ts, warren-d693 / pl-0344 step 9) MUST be registered in ROUTE_TABLE before /plots/:id so the matchRoute first-match-wins router doesn't capture 'needs-attention' as an :id param — same ordering rule that puts /plots/:id/formalize before /plots/:id. listPlotsHandler also accepts ?filter=needs_attention (validates against a singleton whitelist for forward compat) and composes with ?status= by post-filtering the listNeedsAttention rows client-side.

## ui (3 records, updated just now)
